name: Tropical Coffee Cake (Microwave)
recipeInstructions:
For Topping: Combine coconut, nuts, sugar and cinnamon in a small bowl. Set aside.
Combine 1/4 Cup orange juice, oil and eggs in a 2 cup liquid measuring cup. Blend well. Add to cake mix. Stir until well blended (batter will be slightly lumpy). Spread batter in greased 9 x 2-inch round dish. Arrange drained oranges evenly on top. Cook in microwave at Full power for 4 minutes. Sprinkle topping over batter. Continue cooking at Full power for 2 to 3 more minutes until toothpick comes out clean. Let stand 3 minutes before serving.
